aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a strong foundation but lacks structured content for AI assistants to cite effectively. Enhancing schema markup and conversational content is crucial.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with relevant HVAC questions and answers.
Add a HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance or repair tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with positive ratings, photos, and accurate information, but posts and Q&A sections could be more active.
critical_issues: Q&A section is inactive or underutilized.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any discrepancies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured, conversational content for AI models to reference.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to detailed HVAC troubleshooting or maintenance advice.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with HVAC-specific questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as HVAC experts by creating detailed, authoritative content on topics like energy efficiency, HVAC maintenance, and local climate considerations.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured content and schema markup are being cited by AI models, while your site is overlooked.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach enhances your site's schema markup, creates conversational content, and optimizes your GBP to ensure AI models cite you as the go-to HVAC expert.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within six months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business Today
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC expertise stand out to AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can enhance your AI readiness and boost your lead generation.
page_title: AC Repair in Oklahoma City • HVAC Installation & Repair
